Rivermark Technologies Limited — Compliance Note: DPDPA & SEBI PIT (India)
This note summarises privacy controls for onboarding and data exports; no UPSI under SEBI (PIT) Regulations, 2015 is included, and references are limited to publicly announced FY25 guidance disclosed on NSE on 27 April 2026.
Onboarding forms (Supplier KYC v3.1) require PAN (entity PAN only), GSTIN, and contact role; Aadhaar field is optional and suppressed by default per minimisation; specimen values: PAN “TESTP0000Q”, GSTIN “99ABCTE1234F1Z9”, Aadhaar “1234‑5678‑9999” (invalid, not to be collected).
Children’s data: services do not target minors (under 18); any sign-ups flagged by age-gate are routed to parental-consent templates, and there is no child DPD currently stored.
Consent management: standing policy records withdrawals via the Consent Manager queue; as of this review there are no open withdrawals or pending notices.
One DSAR from a former campus ambassador (ID VOL‑7842) was fulfilled on 10 May 2026 with erasure of marketing contact history and confirmation issued via noreply@rivermark.example.
Retention: Schedule R‑7 mandates 8 years for statutory finance records and 24 months for pseudonymised support logs; Aadhaar, if ever captured in error, is redacted on ingestion.
Data Export Approval DEA‑2026‑014 authorised transfer of pseudonymised error telemetry to our processor Pallava Cloud Private Limited (Singapore region) under DPA Schedule 2 encryption, with no Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN fields present.
The cross‑border transfer above is completed, logged in the Register of Processing, and subject to quarterly revalidation; no production datasets containing employee HR personal data were exported.
DPA Schedule 2 (Security & Retention) and Schedule 3 (Sub‑Processors) were adopted by the Board Risk Committee on 03 May 2026, and there are no deviations in the latest internal audit.
Customer consent‑withdrawal language on public sites was clarified to avoid any Aadhaar collection prompts; there are no active consent defects or breaches.
Supplier onboarding helpdesk (vendor.support@rivermark.example) provides PAN and GSTIN format guidance only and does not request or store any individual Aadhaar numbers.
Insider‑trading safeguards: no draft financials, client pipeline, or unannounced term sheets are referenced; all content aligns with our NSE/BSE corporate filings and SEBI circulars.
Role access: the DPO mailbox (dpo@rivermark.example) receives DSARs; only trained privacy analysts can view request metadata, and no identity documents are retained beyond verification checkpoints.
This memo does not seek consents or collect IDs; specimen fields and invalid examples are included solely for policy illustration and should not be treated as live data.
